app.description: Paperless-AI is a document analyzer that integrates with Paperless-NGX to automatically analyze and tag documents using AI. It enhances your document management workflow with intelligent classification.

dialog.title: Paperless-AI Warning
dialog.message:
\Z1WARNING!\Zn

Paperless-AI makes changes to the documents in your production Paperless-NGX instance that cannot be easily undone. Do the configuration carefully and think twice. Please test the results beforehand in a separate development environment and be sure to back up your documents and metadata beforehand.

\Z4Source:\Zn https://github.com/clusterzx/paperless-ai

Do you wish to proceed with installing Paperless-AI?
